title: 4 Pcs Cat Teeth Cleaning Kitten Teething Chewing Toy Rope, Filled Natural Catnip, Stress Release, Cotton Rope Toy, Catnip Toys for Cats, Indoor Cats, Kittens (4 Colors)
features: 1. Durable & Safe for Aggressive Chewers: This 20cm long cat chew toy, made from hand-wound cotton rope, is designed to withstand even the most aggressive chewers. It provides a safe outlet for chewing instincts, helping to clean teeth and reduce plaque and tartar build-up, perfect for kittens with sharp teeth.

2. Irresistible Catnip Attraction: Infused with natural catnip, soaked in water, and then dried into the cotton rope, this toy emits an irresistible odor that cats can't resist. The addition of gall berries at the end of the rope further stimulates your cat, encouraging exciting behaviors like chewing, rubbing, licking, and rolling.

3. Stimulates Play & Hunting Instincts: This interactive toy engages your cat's natural hunting instincts, encouraging them to chew, chase, and play. It promotes healthy exercise, helping to reduce the risk of obesity, while providing hours of fun and mental stimulation.

4. Promotes Oral Health: Not only does this cotton rope toy help clean your cat's teeth by eliminating plaque and tartar, but it also promotes better oral hygiene and keeps their breath fresh. It's a great solution for kittens teething or for preventing damage to furniture from sharp teeth.

5. Perfect for Independent or Interactive Play: Lightweight and compact, this toy can be used for both solo play and interactive bonding with your cat. Whether you're spending quality time together or letting your furry friend entertain themselves, this chew toy offers endless entertainment for your kitten.
